info.title: Swing Pool API
info.description: Backend API for Swing Pool, a subscription platform for golf performance tracking, charity support, and monthly rewards.

get.description: Returns service and process health metadata.

post.summary: Register a new user account and return token pair
Authenticate user and return token pair
Rotate refresh token and mint new access/refresh pair
Revoke refresh session and denylist active access token jti

get.summary: Get current authenticated user charity selection

post.summary: Set charity selection for future payments

get.summary: List authenticated user charity selection history

post.summary: Create independent donation intent linked to payment infrastructure

get.summary: Admin list charity payout ledger entries
Admin fetch charity allocation and payout aggregates

get.description: Auto-generated OpenAPI coverage entry. Route is implemented and available in the backend.

post.summary: Generate automatic entries for eligible users

get.description: Auto-generated OpenAPI coverage entry. Route is implemented and available in the backend.

post.summary: Publish immutable draw result, winners, and prize pool snapshot
Stripe webhook receiver (source of truth for payment finalization)
Create Stripe payment intent and local payment attempt record
Submit user score (stored in full history and confirmed immutable)

get.summary: List authenticated user score history with pagination
Get latest five qualifying competition scores
Get score history record by id for authenticated user

patch.summary: Admin edit score with full audit logging

post.summary: Create a subscription in pending payment state
Preview prorated amount for an allowed upgrade path
